complaint: Lint adversarial barrage 2026-06-10 surfaced four leakage classes the original scope missed: (1) foreign local stylesheets ride bare axis-1 because identity-pinning is opt-in (AUDIT-20260610-01); (2) transitive resources named by the pinned CSS — @font-face woff2 files — were outside the pin's identity closure (AUDIT-20260610-03); (3) preserved-whitespace text imagery (ASCII-art logos in pre) is invisible to both the element and codepoint axes (AUDIT-20260610-04); (4) attribute VALUES beyond URL-kind attrs are an unscanned channel (meta theme-color/color-scheme, title/aria glyphs — AUDIT-20260610-05, parked TASK-12)
